title: Reusable Sports Editorial Poster
sourceTitle: The Last Roar Full Body Standing Portrait Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable sports editorial poster with sports editorial poster with dynamic athlete energy, bold graphic composition, and crisp campaign polish. Full-body standing portrait, centered composition, confident pose. Close-up chest detail shot highlighting jersey texture, number 7, luxury silver chain, premium fabric details. Seated portrait on modern black designer chair, relaxed yet powerful posture, fashion campaign aesthetic. hero athlete poster language Fictional Athlete: fictional elite number-seven forward seen from behind. Sport Context: international tournament night with cheering supporters and cinematic stadium lights. Kit. Palette: deep red, forest green, white trim, and gold accent details. Hero Pose: back-view walkout pose with shoulders squared and boots planted on wet grass. Stadium Mood: epic pre-match atmosphere with mist, flares, and shallow depth of field. Headline Text: THE LAST ROAR. Subject: Make fictional elite number-seven forward seen from behind the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: Full-body standing portrait, centered composition, confident pose. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use hero sports poster structure with jersey silhouette, stadium atmosphere, dramatic rim light, and strong headline area. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in cinematic sports-magazine cover finish with realistic fabric, rain/mist particles, and polished contrast. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use deep red, forest green, white trim, and gold accent details. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
